items.title: Elevated errors on Claude Opus 4.7
items.snippet:

* 2:53 PT / 9:53 UTC -- 2:57 PT / 9:57 UTC
* 3:01 PT / 10:01 UTC -- 3:06 PT / 10:06 UTC
* 3:34 PT / 10:34 UTC -- 3:36 PT / 10:36 UTC

items.title:
You can now /schedule one-time tasks from the CLI or the Routines UI via the Schedule -> Once Trigger. 

Use it to:
* /schedule cleanup this feature flag in 1 week
*/schedule give me a launch repor
items.snippet:
You can now /schedule one-time tasks from the CLI or the Routines UI via the Schedule -> Once Trigger. 

Use it to:
* /schedule cleanup this feature flag in 1 week
*/schedule give me a launch report for my feature in 2 days https://t.co/tiC288hMc7

items.title: An update on recent Claude Code quality reports
items.snippet: We traced recent reports of Claude Code quality issues to three separate changes. Here's what happened and what we're changing.

items.title: Anthropic and Amazon expand collaboration for up to 5 gigawatts of new compute
Scaling Managed Agents: Decoupling the brain from the hands
items.snippet: Harnesses encode assumptions that go stale as models improve. Managed Agents—our hosted service for long-horizon agent work—is built around interfaces that stay stable as harnesses change.

items.title: Quantifying infrastructure noise in agentic coding evals
items.snippet: Infrastructure configuration can swing agentic coding benchmarks by several percentage points—sometimes more than the leaderboard gap between top models.
